title: Lifestyle Creep Is Quietly Stealing $1.4M From You
hook: Every raise you've ever gotten — you spent it. That invisible upgrade has a $1.4 million price tag, and almost nobody talks about it.
angle: Lifestyle inflation silently matches spending to income, keeping even high earners broke. The math shows investing raise deltas instead builds $1.4M over a career.
audience: 25-45 year old earners who've received raises but feel like they never get ahead financially
key_numbers: 75% upgrade lifestyle within 90 days of a raise
Americans earning $200K have near-identical savings rates to those earning $60K
average US raise is 4.3% per year
